query: SELECT storeId, COUNT(*) as days, ROUND(AVG(labourPercent), 1) as avg_labour_pct, ROUND(SUM(netSales), 2) as total_sales, ROUND(SUM(labourCost), 2) as total_labour FROM excel_labour_data GROUP BY storeId ORDER BY storeId;
